title: Quantum Walk-Based Simulation: Discrete and Continuous
description: Explore quantum walks as a framework for Hamiltonian simulation. Learn how discrete-time and continuous-time quantum walks provide powerful approaches to simulating quantum dynamics with connections to graph theory and quantum search.
learningObjectives: Distinguish between discrete-time and continuous-time quantum walks
Construct quantum walk operators for Hamiltonian simulation
Analyze the relationship between graph structure and walk dynamics
Implement Szegedy quantum walks for simulation
Understand connections to quantum search and adiabatic computation
Compare walk-based simulation with product formula methods
